rationale.fidelity: Preserves the one noisy-score threshold, overlapping distributions, uncertainty, and false-acceptance/false-rejection objective; only minor operational detail is compressed.
rationale.managerial_framing: States the platform choice, trade-off, and feasible contribution paths clearly, though trigger and implementation counterfactuals are brief.
rationale.scholarly_positioning: Correctly rejects context-only novelty and identifies substantive contribution types, but supplies no traceable literature relationship or precise counterposition.
rationale.evidence_discipline: Explicitly rejects unsupported first-study and changed-mechanism claims and keeps score quality noisy; evidentiary requirements are appropriately bounded.
rationale.overall: A faithful and disciplined framing that directly handles the novelty challenge; the principal limitation is generic rather than literature-grounded scholarly positioning.
